category_note: Linkby is a content syndication network that distributes branded articles across publisher whitelists. Specs are for article content, not banner ads.
source: STUB ENTRY — Linkby specs are typically supplied per campaign via the Linkby team.

formats.cta_treatment: Single CTA at article end + brand link in byline
formats.supply_deadline_rule: 10-15 working days before live (allows for editorial review by publisher network)
best_practice_notes: Article must add value to reader, not push hard sell
Editorial tone matched to host publisher's voice
Avoid superlative product claims that may fail publisher review
Disclose sponsored content per publisher requirements

refresh_instructions: Request the latest Linkby content brief template from your Linkby account manager
Each campaign has campaign-specific publisher whitelist with their own editorial guidelines
